---
title: "Orchard: Heterogeneous Parallelism and Fine-grained Fusion for Complex Tree Traversals"
date: 2024-05-21
year: 2024
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3652605"
venue: "TACO 2024"
award: ""
code: "https://github.com/vidsinghal/Orchard"
slides: ""
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Vidush Singhal
  - name: Laith Sakka
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Ryan R Newton
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Journal
description: ""
---
